nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives APPROVAL_APPROVED events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts approval_id, channel, recipient from payload

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate dispatch

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: skip or exit

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.id as approval_id,
  a.project_id,
  a.approval_type,
  a.request_summary,
  a.request_data,
  a.decided_at,
  a.decided_by,
  p.project_number,
  p.object_street,
  p.object_zip,
  p.object_city,
  c.company_name as client_name,
  c.email as client_email
FROM approvals a
JOIN projects p ON a.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
WHERE a.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.approval_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Load Approval + Project
nodes.notes: Loads approval with project and client info

nodes.name: Build Message
nodes.notes: Builds telegram/whatsapp/email messages from approval data

nodes.name: Route by Channel
nodes.notes: Routes to telegram, whatsapp, or email based on channel

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: Sends via Telegram to recipient or default chat

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp (Placeholder)
nodes.notes: WhatsApp via Superchat — skip gracefully if not configured

nodes.name: Check Email Recipient
nodes.notes: Validates email recipient, fallback to Telegram if missing

nodes.name: Has Email Recipient?
nodes.notes: If email_fallback=false: send email. If true: fallback to telegram

nodes.name: Email Fallback Telegram
nodes.notes: Fallback: sends via Telegram when no email recipient

nodes.name: After Dispatch
nodes.notes: Merges result after channel dispatch

parameters.query:
UPDATE approvals 
SET dispatched_at = now(),
    dispatch_channel = '{{ $json.channel }}',
    dispatch_status = 'sent'
WHERE id = '{{ $json.approval_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Update Approval Status
nodes.notes: Marks approval as dispatched with channel info

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks workflow step as DONE

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
DO $$ BEGIN
  UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.event_id }}'::uuid;
EXCEPTION WHEN invalid_text_representation THEN NULL;
END $$;

-- Emit APPROVAL_DISPATCHED event
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow, reference_table, reference_id)
VALUES (
  'APPROVAL_DISPATCHED',
  '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'approval_id', '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.approval_id }}',
    'channel', '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.channel }}',
    'approval_type', '{{ $json.approval_type }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M5_01_Approval_Dispatcher',
  'approvals',
  '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.approval_id }}'::uuid
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit APPROVAL_DISPATCHED
nodes.notes: Marks input event processed and emits APPROVAL_DISPATCHED

nodes.name: Telegram Confirm
nodes.notes: Confirms dispatch to Dennis

nodes.name: Done (Success)
nodes.notes: Success response

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles DONE (skip) and IN_PROGRESS (exit)
